skill.name: frontend-ui-dark-ts
skill.description: Build dark-themed React applications using Tailwind CSS with custom theming, glassmorphism effects, and Framer Motion animations. Use when creating dashboards, admin panels, or data-rich interfaces...
skill.summary: Build dark-themed React applications using Tailwind CSS with custom theming, glassmorphism effects, ...
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged 69 potential issues, all of which are false positives. The flagged patterns (shell commands, hardcoded URLs, path traversal, weak crypto) are actually documentation examples and code templates in SKILL.md. No malicious code or security risks detected. This is a legitimate frontend UI skill for building dark-themed React applications.

content.value_statement: Create modern dark-themed React applications with Tailwind CSS, glassmorphism effects, and smooth Framer Motion animations for dashboards and admin panels.
actual_capabilities: Create dark-themed React components with custom Tailwind CSS configuration
Implement glassmorphism effects using backdrop blur and transparent backgrounds
Add smooth animations using Framer Motion variants and page transitions
Build responsive layouts with app shell, sidebar, and page header patterns
Configure design tokens for colors, spacing, typography, and status indicators
Set up mobile-friendly UI with safe area insets and touch-friendly targets
limitations: Does not include backend or API integration patterns
Requires React 18+ and Vite build environment
Does not provide pre-built component library - only patterns and templates
Glass effects may not work on older browsers without backdrop-filter support

use_cases.title: Build a dark-mode admin dashboard
use_cases.description: Create a professional admin panel with sidebar navigation, data tables, and status indicators using the dark theme patterns.

use_cases.title: Design a data visualization interface
use_cases.description: Build a data-rich dashboard with glassmorphic cards, smooth transitions, and custom color tokens for data visualization.

use_cases.title: Implement a modern landing page
use_cases.description: Create a sleek landing page with animated sections, glass overlay modals, and polished micro-interactions.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Dark Theme Setup
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the frontend-ui-dark-ts skill to set up a new React project with Tailwind CSS dark theme configuration. Include custom brand colors, neutral backgrounds, and text color tokens.
prompt_templates.scenario: Starting a new dark-themed React project

prompt_templates.title: Glass Card Component
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a glassmorphic card component using the frontend-ui-dark-ts patterns. Include backdrop blur, subtle borders, and proper dark theme colors.
prompt_templates.scenario: Building a card component with glass effect

prompt_templates.title: Animated Page Transitions
prompt_templates.prompt: Implement smooth page transitions using Framer Motion. Use the fade-in and slide-up variants from the frontend-ui-dark-ts skill for route changes.
prompt_templates.scenario: Adding animations to React Router navigation

prompt_templates.title: Complete Dashboard Layout
prompt_templates.prompt: Build a complete dashboard layout with app shell, sidebar navigation, page header, and responsive glass cards. Include status badges and data visualization color tokens.
prompt_templates.scenario: Creating a full admin dashboard interface

output_examples.input: Create a dark-themed button component with brand purple background
output_examples.output: A button component using bg-brand with hover:bg-brand-hover, proper focus ring styles, and touch-friendly sizing

output_examples.input: Build a sidebar with glassmorphic panel effect
output_examples.output: A sidebar using glass-panel class with backdrop-blur-lg, dark background, and subtle border styling

output_examples.input: Add a fade-in animation to a modal component
output_examples.output: Modal with initial opacity 0, animate to opacity 1, using Framer Motion with 0.3s easeOut transition

best_practices: Use semantic color tokens (text-primary, text-secondary) instead of hardcoded colors for maintainability
Apply glass effects sparingly - overuse can reduce readability and performance
Test animations on actual devices - reduce motion preferences should be respected
anti_patterns: Avoid using pure black backgrounds - use neutral-bg colors with proper contrast ratios
Do not apply glass effect to all elements - reserve for elevated surfaces and overlays
Avoid excessive animation complexity that impacts page load or interaction responsiveness

faq.question: Does this work with Create React App or only Vite?
faq.answer: The skill uses Vite-specific features like env() for safe areas. For CRA, you would need to adjust the Tailwind config and CSS variables.

faq.question: Can I use custom colors instead of the default brand purple?
faq.answer: Yes, modify the brand colors in tailwind.config.js to match your design system.

faq.question: Do the glass effects work in all browsers?
faq.answer: Glass effects require backdrop-filter support. Older browsers will show a solid background instead.

faq.question: How do I add more animation variants?
faq.answer: Define new variants in the Animation Patterns section and add corresponding keyframes to tailwind.config.js.

faq.question: Can I use this with TypeScript?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill includes TypeScript examples and the configuration is JavaScript-compatible.

faq.question: Is this skill compatible with Claude Code and Codex?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill supports claude, codex, and claude-code tools.
